enforcement_depth: FULL — all 8 phases + Wave 11 (billing audit + P1 re-triage) + Wave 12 (m12 elections: 5 REAL P1s fixed, 3 FPs reclassified) + Wave 13 (m11 documents/credentials: 5 REAL P1s fixed) + Wave 14 (m14 national dashboard: 5 REAL P1s fixed) + Wave 15 (m01 auth-onboarding: 5 REAL P1s fixed)

m01-auth-onboarding.p1_corrected: 5→0 (Wave 15: OnboardingState entity + GET /onboarding/state + PUT /onboarding/step [WF-005 wizard] + POST /invitations/bulk-import [WF-009 preview/dedup/token] implemented)

m05-membership.p1_corrected: 4→0 (Wave 16: 3 REAL fixed — resignMembership + deceaseMembership emit membership.status.changed, importRosterMembers emits membership.imported with new consumer; 1 FALSE POSITIVE — auth gap was on unwired legacy membership/reviewApplication.ts, the live wired approveMembershipApplication.ts already enforces requirePosition[Secretary,President])

m09-training.p1_corrected: 3→1 (Wave 11: 2 resolved in prior waves, only cert-wiring REAL)

m12-elections-governance.p1_corrected: 8→0 (Wave 12: 5 REAL fixed [enum reconcile, updateCandidateStatus migration, passageThreshold, domain events, election.published+M04 consumer], 3 FP reclassified [castVote/createNominee/WF-076-077 are unreachable dead duplicates; live castBallot/createCandidate are TypeSpec-registered])

m14-national-dashboard.p1_corrected: 5→0 (Wave 14: 3 missing endpoints implemented [chapters list, chapter drill-down, platform summary], WF-085 drill-down satisfied, DashboardExported event emitted)

EM-M07-no-typespec.description: No communication.tsp TypeSpec file — 28-handler module entirely hand-wired (deferred — enums exist)

EC-007-platformadmin-gap.description: platformadmin (40 handlers) — spec coverage gap vs handler count

EF-M06-001.description: No recordPayment handler — non-Stripe orgs cannot record manual payments

AL-001-password-change.description: auth.password-changed event has no audit log emission

AL-002-mfa-lifecycle.description: auth.mfa-enabled/disabled events have no audit log calls

UJ-01-spa-bypass.description: announcement-list.tsx uses raw <a href> bypassing SPA router

ED-GLOBAL-xg6xh9c9.description: better-auth 2FA Bypass via Premature Session Caching

EM-M02-qrhmac.reason: Reclassified — QR HMAC covered by EF-M11-002

EF-M01-export-pii.reason: PII allowlist — only 14 GDPR-safe fields returned

EM-M07-cancelled.reason: cancelled enum value now present in messageStatusEnum

EX-NOTIF-enum.reason: Code correct (18 types in schema + EVENT_CONTRACTS). DOMAIN_MODEL doc stale → P2

UJ-NAV-orphan10.reason: Replaced by UJ-01-spa-bypass (different finding at same severity)

EM-M07-zero-events.reason: Domain events added to 6 key communication handlers (7/46 now emit)

EM-M09-dead-code.reason: Deleted handlers/training/ — all superseded by association:operations/

EM-M04-y5z6a7b8.reason: getOrganizationProfile behind authMiddleware (routes.ts:1467); session auth present

EM-M05-consumers.reason: Listeners now registered in domain-event-consumers.ts (dues.payment.recorded:45, member.suspended:672, member.removed:697); residual notification-only gap is P2 not P1

EM-M05-directory-endpoint.reason: searchDirectory.ts exists; routes.ts:908 GET /association/member/directory/search — path divergence is P2 EM-M05-i9j0k1l2

EM-M05-application-endpoint.reason: createMembershipApplication.ts exists; routes.ts:570 POST /association/member/applications — path divergence is P2

EM-M05-evt-resigned.reason: resignMembership.ts now emits membership.status.changed (oldStatus→resigned); existing consumer notifies member of status/ID-card change

EM-M05-evt-deceased.reason: deceaseMembership.ts now emits membership.status.changed (oldStatus→deceased); existing consumer notifies on status change

EM-M05-evt-imported.reason: importRosterMembers.ts now emits membership.imported with personIds[]; new consumer in domain-event-consumers.ts sends welcome notifications to imported members

EM-M05-P1-AUTH.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — path divergence. Audit flagged membership/reviewApplication.ts (no requirePosition) but that handler is UNWIRED (no route in app.ts or generated routes). Live application review is association:member/approveMembershipApplication.ts which already enforces requirePosition([Secretary,President]) at line 20.

EM-M12-3f8a1b2c.reason: False positive — legacy elections/castVote.ts is an unreferenced dead duplicate. Live voting is castBallot (TypeSpec POST /association/member/ballots, registered routes.ts).

EM-M12-7d4e5f6a.reason: False positive — legacy elections/createNominee.ts is dead. Live nomination is createCandidate (TypeSpec POST /association/member/candidates, registered).

EM-M12-6e7f8a9b.reason: False positive — WF-076/077 voting+nomination flows ARE reachable via castBallot + createCandidate; only the legacy duplicates are unreachable.

EM-M12-d2e3f4a5.reason: electionType enum reconciled TypeSpec→DB (officer/bylaw); governance.tsp Election model rewritten to match schema; createElection explicit field mapping replaces blind spread.

EM-M12-8e9f0a1b.reason: updateNomineeStatus migrated to TypeSpec as updateCandidateStatus (POST /association/member/candidates/{candidateId}/status); hand-wire removed from app.ts.

EM-M12-a1b2c3d4.reason: WF-078 passageThreshold now evaluated in certifyElection — bylaw winners must clear threshold % of voters; winners determined by plurality per position and marked elected.

EM-M12-a0b1c2d3.reason: Live association:member election handlers now emit domain events: election.created, election.status.changed (open-nominations/open-voting), election.deleted, nomination.submitted.

EM-M12-e4f5a6b7.reason: election.published event added to registry with winners payload; emitted from certifyElection; new consumer performs M04 officer transition (ends outgoing terms + checklist, creates winner terms, emits officer.transitioned/assigned).

EM-M11-7a3e1c02.reason: createDocument no longer hardcodes status:published — added status?: 'draft'|'published' to DocumentCreateRequest (TypeSpec), defaults to 'draft' when omitted, honors explicit 'published'.

EM-M11-g4b67c23.reason: createDocument now role-guards org/chapter-owned documents via requireOfficerTerm; self-owned person documents (member:owner) still permitted per API contract.

EM-M11-d1e34f90.reason: M11 handlers now emit domain events: document.created (createDocument + uploadNewDocumentVersion), credential.generated (generateCertificatePdf), verification.requested (verifyCertificatePublic). Events added to domain-events.registry.ts.

EM-M11-e2f45a01.reason: Event consumers added in domain-event-consumers.ts: person.updated (ID card re-download notification), membership.status.changed, training.completed (certificate-available notification).

EM-M11-83a8b9c0.reason: generateCertificatePdf now returns real PDF bytes (application/pdf, %PDF header) via renderCertificatePdf (pdf-lib, US Letter landscape) instead of HTML; WF-074 satisfied.

EM-M14-71a3e2f0.reason: GET /admin/national/chapters implemented (TypeSpec listNationalChapters → platformadmin/listNationalChapters.ts). Paginated/sortable chapter comparison list; BR-36 access via resolveAssociationAccess; M14-R2 suppression for <5-member chapters.

EM-M14-82b4f3a1.reason: GET /admin/national/chapters/{organizationId} implemented (getNationalChapterDetail.ts). Returns memberStatusBreakdown + creditComplianceBreakdown; 404 when snapshot missing.

EM-M14-93c5a4b2.reason: GET /admin/national/platform implemented (getPlatformSummary.ts). Platform-admin-only cross-association rollup via listAssociationIdsForMonth + getAssociationAggregate; sortable + paginated.

EM-M14-c6f8d7e5.reason: WF-085 chapter drill-down satisfied by getNationalChapterDetail — single-chapter detail with status + credit compliance breakdowns from chapterSnapshots.

EM-M14-b1e3c2d0.reason: dashboard.exported domain event added to registry and emitted from exportNationalDashboard with {exportId, associationId, format, exportedBy}.

EM-M01-d8e9f0a1.reason: OnboardingState entity created — onboarding_state table (org-scoped, organizationId unique, currentStep 1-5, stepsCompleted jsonb, completedAt) via handlers/onboarding/repos/onboarding.schema.ts + migration 0058_fast_stingray.sql.

EM-M01-a1b2c3d4.reason: GET /onboarding/state implemented (TypeSpec getOnboardingState → handlers/onboarding/getOnboardingState.ts). Officer-gated via requireOfficerTerm against requested orgId; 404 when wizard not started.

EM-M01-e5f6a7b8.reason: PUT /onboarding/step implemented (handlers/onboarding/updateOnboardingStep.ts). Enforces in-order steps (M01-004 → 422), bootstraps at step 1, advances currentStep, emits onboarding.completed on final step.

EM-M01-c9d0e1f2.reason: WF-005 resumable onboarding wizard satisfied — state persisted org-scoped across 5 steps (profile/import/dues/gateway/invite); resume via GET /onboarding/state, save via PUT /onboarding/step.

EM-M01-34a5b6c7.reason: WF-009 bulk import implemented (POST /invitations/bulk-import → handlers/invite/bulkImportMembers.ts). CSV parse (quoted fields), preview|import modes, dedup (within-CSV + against pending invites), HMAC claim-token issuance per valid row. Deviation: JSON csvContent string instead of multipart (codegen pipeline does not support multipart).

wave11_p1_triage.highest_risk: RESOLVED (Wave 12). EM-M12 cluster closed: 3 were false positives (legacy castVote/createNominee dead duplicates — live castBallot/createCandidate were always registered); 5 REAL fixed (enum reconcile, updateCandidateStatus migration, passageThreshold eval, domain events, election.published + M04 officer-transition consumer). m12 P1 8→0, score 6.0→9.0.
